methodological_notes: In-sample ER metrics are optimistic because thresholds were calibrated on the same hand-labeled pool; cross-validation gives the generalization estimate.

Geocoding distances are only observed for candidate pairs that survived the 150 m spatial block; gross geocoding failures appear as missed matches, null coordinate coverage, or UNBLOCKABLE candidates rather than large distances.
